response: THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME IS EXPRESSED AS W_F = W * (0.98)^N. TO ACHIEVE A 25% REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE, WE SOLVE 1 - (0.98)^N = 0.25, WHICH REQUIRES N TO BE AT LEAST 12 COMPONENTS. CHECK THE CLOCK TO ENSURE YOU HAVE ENOUGH TIME FOR THIS CALCULATION. GLANCE AT THE CLOCK AGAIN TO VERIFY YOUR MATH. LOOK AT THE CLOCK ONE MORE TIME BEFORE YOU START YOUR RIDE.
